description: Remove the null guard in a hash table init function: the guard 'if (!t)' with a return body protects t->buckets from NULL dereference. Removing it allows callers passing NULL to crash.

metadata.notes: Targets htable.c:46 — multiline guard 'if (!t)\n    return NULL;' protecting t->buckets dereference. graph.c excluded to ensure multiline guard coverage.
